title: nycteranthus englishiae
intro: Nycteranthus englishiae, commonly known as English night-blooming cereus or Dune Hedgehog, is a succulent plant species native to the Americas, characterized by its unique, nocturnal flowering habit. The health benefits of Nycteranthus englishiae include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products. The bioactive constituents of Nycteranthus englishiae include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
